headline: Melania SLAYS Epstein Rumors 👠💥 Demands Survivor SPILL TEA ☕📜
text:
First Lady Melania Trump 🇺🇸👑 dropping BOMBS 💣🔥 at White House, DENYING 🚫 all ties to pedo kingpin Jeffrey Epstein 🕵️‍♂️🍆 like 'END THIS BULLSHIT TODAY 😡💨!' Called those online rumors that Epstein hooked her up with Donny T 🍊👨‍💼 'MEAN-SPIRITED SMEAR CAMPAIGN 🖕😤 to trash my flawless rep!' Surprise mic drop 🎤🍑 on Thursday, urging Congress 🤝📜 to give Epstein's sex traffic survivors their DAY IN COURT 🏛️🔥 – 'LET 'EM TESTIFY UNDER OATH ⚖️💅, spill EVERY juicy deet into the RECORD forever 📚‼️ Only THEN we get the REAL TEA ☕👀!' 

Melania spilling: 'Never Epstein's victim 😇🚫, just crossed paths once in 2000 like awkward party bump 🤷‍♀️💃 – ZERO knowledge of his nasty victim abuse 😱🍑, not involved, not participating!' Denies knowing Ghislaine Maxwell 👩‍💼🚫 (that jailed pimp queen 👑🔒), waving off 2002 email to 'G' as 'casual polite chit-chat ✉️😘' – complimenting NY Mag story on 'JE' with G's pic 📸📰, 'CANT WAIT for Palm Beach 🏖️🍹, hit me up in NY 📞❤️ Love, Melania 💋!' (That mag had Trump calling Epstein 'terrific guy' & 'fun with young hotties' 😏👧 – Donny's old vibes!)

Pushing HARD for victims' sworn stories 🗣️⚖️: 'EVERY woman deserves her spotlight 🌟 to air the dirt!' Refs bigwigs resigning over Epstein links 💼🚪 – 'Not guilt auto-win 🎰, but TRANSPARENCY OR BUST 🔍💥!' No Q&A from press peeps 📰🚫, ghosted like a boss 👻💅. Dem Robert Garcia (Oversight boss Dem 🔥) simping: 'WE AGREE 👏, Comer schedule hearings NOW ⏰!' But Giuffre fam & survivors clapping back 👏😠: 'We've been BRAVE AF 🦸‍♀️📢, y'all in power HIDE FILES 🗂️🚫 – deflection, not justice! Time for Trump admin to DROP THE REST 💣📜!'

Legal Ls for haters: HarperCollins yanking 'unverified' book claims 📖✂️ Melania met Don via Epstein, Daily Beast APOLOGIZING 😩🙏 for trash article. Battling Wolff's Fire & Fury BS 🔥📚 over modeling agent Epstein link – she threatened $1B lawsuit 💰⚖️, he's counter-suing 🤺, but Melania: 'My lawyers SLAY these lies 🗡️✅, rep stays PRISTINE 👑✨!' Rare AF appearance for elusive FLOTUS 🕵️‍♀️🌙 – reigniting Epstein file wars 📁💥! Donny admits knew Jeff but booted him from Mar-a-Lago for 'creep vibes' 🚪😬 – mentioned in files but ZERO dirt 🧼✅. Melania channeling Be Best boss energy 💪👠, no cap! Survivors vs power players cage match 🥊🔥 – who ya got? 👀🍿
